title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Codex and Claude Code across five dimensions: user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost/speed. He argues the direct comparison itself is the wrong question and emphasizes a broader strategic perspective on developer tool selection.
